title: Sprint Folder
description: Metadata about a sprint-log/<date>_<slug>/ folder. Represents a trunknux artifact: what was built in a sprint. The folder must contain a SPRINT_SUMMARY.md. The name must follow the date-slug convention: YYYY-MM-DD_<kebab-slug>.

folderName.description: Full folder name in date-slug form: YYYY-MM-DD_<kebab-slug>.

slug.description: Extracted slug portion: lowercase kebab-case identifier. No leading or trailing hyphens; no consecutive hyphens.

hasSummary.description: Whether SPRINT_SUMMARY.md exists in the folder. Must be true for a valid sprint folder.

summaryTitle.description: H1 title extracted from SPRINT_SUMMARY.md (the first markdown heading). Free text.

examples.summaryTitle: Sprint 1-2: EPOD Submission + Statute of Limitations
